metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for productivity workflows - skills, agents, commands, and hooks

plugins.name: dev-skill
plugins.description: Validation and generation tools for best practices skills

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Development workflow with TDD, debugging, and collaboration skills

plugins.name: build-ios-apps
plugins.description: Build iOS apps with workflows for SwiftUI UI work, refactors, performance audits, and simulator debugging

plugins.name: marketplace
plugins.description: Action toolkit for planning, diagnosing, improving, and operating search, recommender, and pre-member personalisation systems in two-sided trust marketplaces. 7 commands plus a context-extractor meta-skill, over 3 research-grounded knowledge libraries. Canonical stack examples: OpenSearch, AWS Personalize, Twilio Segment, Amplitude, Databricks, Datadog.

plugins.name: dev-debug-cpp
plugins.description: C++ debugging for segfaults, memory corruption, threading issues, and linker/ABI problems

plugins.name: dev-python
plugins.description: Modern Python 3.12+ development with uv, ruff, pydantic, FastAPI, Django and production-ready practices

plugins.name: dev-shell
plugins.description: Shell scripting toolkit with Google Style Guide expertise and refactoring capabilities
